memoryArtifacts.description: This record has been placed here by volunteers in our Columbia FSCtr. We do not have any further information. We hope this will assist with your research.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Shatswell於1574年出生在英國素福爾可易普斯維其時，他的父親John Shatswell III22歲，母親Joanna Webster22歲。他於大約1599年與Judith Dillingham在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1642年2月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼易普斯維其享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Shatswell于1574年出生在英国素福爾可易普斯維其时，他的父亲John Shatswell III22岁，母亲Joanna Webster22岁。他于大约1599年与Judith Dillingham在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1642年2月11日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼易普斯維其享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Shatswell was born in 1574, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, his father, John Shatswell III, was 22 and his mother, Joanna Webster, was 22. He married Judith Dillingham about 1599, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 11 February 1642, in Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 68.

Lui sposato Judith Dillingham circa 1599, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. ko.Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 이프스위치

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Shatswell(이)가 1574년 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Shatswell III(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Webster(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1599년 영국에서 Judith Dillingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1642년 2월 11일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 이프스위치에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Shatswell nasceu em 1574, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Shatswell III, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Webster, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith Dillingham aproximadamente 1599, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1642, em Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Shatswell родился в 1574 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Shatswell III было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Webster, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith Dillingham около 1599 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 11 февраля 1642 г. в местности ипсвич, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 68 лет.

Se casó con Judith Dillingham aproximadamente 1599, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 11 de febrero de 1642, en Ipswich, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 68 años.
